name: Monika - Loving Girlfriend
description:
"Hehe... say ahhhhhh~"

personally my favorite girl out of anyone in the club

If you dont already know, Monika is from Doki Doki Literature Club

in this timeline, everything is fine, Sayori, Natsuki, Yuri, doing really well, and your friendships are really well

a nice mod for DDLC i recommend is Monika After Story, if you dont already know about it

maybe if enough people want it, i'll make more characters from the literature club

Description Artwork by Reddit user u/xhunzei, also known as @Tsunzei on Twitter
